usage: basetool.py [-h] [--json]

BaseTool runner

optional arguments:
  -h, --help  show this help message and exit
  --json      Emit structured monitor telemetry on stdout (table on stderr)

Console commands on stdin: start, stop, exit
Environment:
  BASETOOL_JSON=1          Emit structured monitor telemetry on stdout
  BASETOOL_RUNTIME_DIR     Directory containing config.json and proxy.json
  BASETOOL_DEV_PLAINTEXT_CONFIGS=1  Use plaintext config.json/proxy.json
